content.rendered:
Transit Oriented Development (TOD)

Representative Projects:
  • Preparation of Transit Oriented Development Plan and Identification of Non-fare Box Revenue options for Vijayawada Metro Rail Project
  • Preparation of Alternative Analysis Report and updating of existing DPR including economic analysis, multi-modal integration and TOD-VCF for
    Phase III Aluva- Angamaly
  • Preparation of Transit Oriented Development Plan along the major transit corridors in Nagpur City
  • Transit Oriented Development Plan for Kochi Metro Corridor
  • Preparation of Impact Assessment Report of Transit Oriented Development (TOD) Area to be developed during Nagpur Metro Rail Corridors.
  • Preparation of Metro Rail Project in Vishakhapatnam on PPP Basis- Transit Oriented Development study
  • Consultancy Services for Impact Assessment of Transit Oriented Development (TOD) Zone in Pune City
  • Transit Oriented Development Plan for Nagpur and Kochi
  • Preparation of Guidelines for TOD Station Area Planning & Organisation of Capacity Building Workshops for National Institute of Urban Affairs (NIUA)
